REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (708 Great Highway, San Francisco Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $1,103,000.00. Bond is not required. The Court granted the petition (subject to a written order).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.
